Judge Pro Tem: Andrew Westley, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Gaetani Real Estate is present. Represented by Tony Hay.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Andrea Campos is present.
Attorney Rodin Hai Jew appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of November 9, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
